prompt: Generate a detailed CAD model rendering of the corkscrew from image 1. Render it with the polished, reflective metallic finish and clean studio lighting characteristic of image 2.
prompt_refined: Generate a precise CAD model rendering of the corkscrew depicted in image 1. Apply a highly polished, reflective silver metallic finish, mimicking the material quality of the jewelry in image 2. Illuminate the corkscrew with bright, even studio lighting and present it against a clean, neutral background, consistent with the visual style of image 2.
